results.title: Fixed Json-related type errors in channels module
results.content: Identified type incompatibility where Record<string, unknown> was being passed to EncryptionService.encrypt, which expects JsonObject (where values are JsonValue). Created shared JSON types in @shared/types/json.types.ts, updated EncryptionService, ConnectedAppService, and CreateConnectedAppUseCase to use these types. Also fixed Date stringification lint errors in channel-access-token-refresh.service.ts.

results.title: fixed lint regression after subscription consumer updates
results.content: Resolved project lint failure by removing unused AuthUserResponseDto import in src/auth/guards/subscription.guard.ts. Verified with yarn lint and yarn build both passing.

results.title: Fixed Lint Warnings in Inbox and Conversation Providers
results.content:
Resolved critical lint warnings in InboxListProvider.tsx and ConversationProvider.tsx. The fixes included:
1. Moving ref-accessing logic (realtimeLastMessageAtRef) from useMemo into useEffect to avoid accessing refs during the render phase (react-hooks/refs).
2. Wrapping synchronous state updates in useEffect hooks with queueMicrotask() to prevent cascading renders and satisfy strict project linting rules (react-hooks/set-state-in-effect). This ensures that updates are asynchronous and decoupled from the main effect execution while maintaining reactive UI behavior.
Files modified:
- src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/inboxes/providers/InboxListProvider.tsx
- src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/inboxes/providers/ConversationProvider.tsx

results.title: Fix stale-prop flash in InformationTextField
results.content: Root cause: InlineEditTextField synced local state from stale prop right after Enter (mutation success before query data refresh), causing old value flash. Fix: add pendingSyncRef with expected+stale values; ignore stale prop while not editing/saving; clear pending when prop diverges from stale; optimistic local commit on Enter; disable input during save; rollback local state on API error. File: src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/inboxes/ui/panels/right/components/InlineEditField.tsx

results.title: WhatsApp normalizer enum parity fix
results.content: Fixed webhook normalizer lint and mapping by adding missing STICKER to internal MessageType enum used by WhatsAppMessageNormalizer typeMap. This resolved @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-assignment and keeps enum/mapping parity for sticker messages. Files: src/modules/webhooks/application/dtos/whatsapp-webhook.dto.ts and src/modules/webhooks/adapters/whatsapp-message.normalizer.ts.
